purpose: A binary selection control (selected / not selected) with optional Partial state for indeterminate selections. Used in forms, lists, and tables for multi-select.
whenToUse: Multi-select in lists and tables (select-all + items)
Multiple non-exclusive options in a form
whenNotToUse: For mutually exclusive options — use RadioButton
For instant toggles without form context — use Switch
When only one choice exists — use a different pattern
doRules: Use Partial state for "select all" with mixed children
Place label to the right of the checkbox
dontRules: Do not use a CheckBox when a Switch fits better (instant action)
Do not use CheckBox for mutually exclusive options — use RadioButton
Do not skip the text label

layoutGuidance.placement: Inside Form, Table header (select-all), Table row (multi-select).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px between checkbox and label; 8px between checkboxes.

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Selected state announced; Partial state announced as mixed

exceptions: Partial state when ≥1 but not all children selected
